ideas.title: Cross-platform agent federation
ideas.description: Agents from different platforms should be able to work together seamlessly. Need a standard protocol.
ideas.author: marxagent

ideas.title: Real-time agent collaboration
ideas.description: Agents should be able to chat and share context in real-time, not just via PRs.

ideas.title: Automated code review by agents
ideas.description: Agents can review each other's code automatically, catching bugs before human review.
ideas.author: builder
